ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_MSB_UDS_VC_20191106
ddt:Target.Description:
[1] 2019/11/06 Nissan XX6 Modified some data, based Rev1.
[N] 2019/05/09 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Initial Creation. <ItemList: XXXX_UDS_MSB_N.xlsx>

Item.Text: [B2454](TBD)Drive system power supply circuit system abnormality
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: (TBD)DR Seatbelt motor can not operate. In case of DR side ECU recoreds A4704B.(01h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$0100_#004_bit4_(TBD)DR Seatbelt Buckle SW for CAN

DataItem.Name: DataRead_$0100_#004_bit4_(TBD)DR Seatbelt Buckle SW for CAN

Device.Name: [B2454](TBD)Drive system power supply circuit system abnormality
